label: Ontology Completeness

deductions.reason: Required entities, relationships, claims, or decision points are missing per CKO §8–§9.
deductions.suggestedFix: Resolve critical gaps via assigned factory agents before publication review.

deductions.reason: High-priority gaps block maturity level advancement.
deductions.suggestedFix: Schedule gap-resolution work items from ontology-work-plan.json.

deductions.reason: Ontology contract requires complete entity coverage.
deductions.suggestedFix: Run the matching builder agent for missing_entity.

deductions.reason: Ontology contract requires complete relationship coverage.
deductions.suggestedFix: Run the matching builder agent for missing_relationship.

deductions.reason: Ontology contract requires complete claim coverage.
deductions.suggestedFix: Run the matching builder agent for missing_claim.

deductions.reason: Ontology contract requires complete decision_point coverage.
deductions.suggestedFix: Run the matching builder agent for missing_decision_point.

deductions.reason: Fracture diagnoses require classification when one exists clinically.
deductions.suggestedFix: Link has_classification and has_grade edges to a classification system.

recommendations: Resolve critical gaps via assigned factory agents before publication review.
Schedule gap-resolution work items from ontology-work-plan.json.
Run the matching builder agent for missing_entity.
Run the matching builder agent for missing_relationship.
Run the matching builder agent for missing_claim.
Link has_classification and has_grade edges to a classification system.
